info.description: Identity and authorization service for the Votera platform.
info.title: Votera API

get.summary: List all registrations for the current user (across all events)

post.description:
Authenticate using an email address or Iraqi mobile number (+9647XXXXXXXXX) combined
with a password. Returns access and refresh tokens on success.
The `identifier` field accepts either:
• A valid email address (e.g. user@example.com)
• An Iraqi mobile number in E.164 format (e.g. +9647852759150)

400.description: Validation error or invalid identifier format

post.description: Send a 6-digit OTP to the given email address or Iraqi mobile number (+9647XXXXXXXXX); use /login/verify to complete login

requestBody.description: Email address or Iraqi mobile number

post.description:
Submit the 6-digit OTP received via email or SMS to complete login.
Identifier must be the same email or Iraqi mobile number (+9647XXXXXXXXX) used in /login/otp.
Logout user and invalidate tokens
Change the authenticated user's password
Change a specific user's password (admin function)
post.summary: Change user password (bypass old password check) (Admin)

post.description: Initiate password reset by sending a reset email
Complete password reset using the token sent via email
Get a new access token using refresh token

Register with email+password or Iraqi mobile number.
Both paths return 202 Accepted — no tokens are issued until OTP is verified.
Email path: verify via POST /auth/register/verify-email.
Phone path: verify via POST /auth/register/verify.

202.description: OTP sent — verify to receive tokens

400.description: Validation error or unknown identifier format

409.description: Email or phone number already registered

post.description:
Verify the OTP sent during registration (email or phone) and receive access tokens.
Identifier must be the same email or Iraqi mobile number (+9647XXXXXXXXX) used in /auth/register.

get.description: Retrieve paginated active sessions for the authenticated user with filtering options

parameters.description: Search in device_id, user_agent, or ip_address
parameters.name: search

post.description: Authenticate using a Telegram widget payload
Generates a one-time tg:// link. Open it with url_launcher on Flutter to start native Telegram auth. Poll /auth/telegram/status with the returned token to receive JWTs.

get.description: Returns pending / success / expired. On success, tokens are included and the session is destroyed (one-time retrieval).

post.description: Called by Telegram servers when the bot receives a message. Verifies the X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token header, parses /start login_{uuid} commands, and finalises the auth session.

post.summary: Get a presigned URL to upload a certification document
Approve or reject a certification request (admin only)

parameters.description: Filter events starting after this time (RFC3339)
parameters.name: start_after

parameters.description: Filter events starting before this time (RFC3339)
parameters.name: start_before

get.summary: List all registrations for an event (organizer only)

post.summary: Register a team for an event

get.summary: Get team's registration for an event

post.summary: Publish final results for event (organizer only)
Open event for team registration (organizer only)

get.summary: Get the current user's project for an event

get.description: Returns submitted projects for an event including the team name for each project.
get.summary: List submitted projects awaiting organizer review

post.summary: Cancel a submitted project back to draft
Add a category to a project

delete.summary: Remove a category from a project

post.summary: Get presigned upload URL for project media

delete.summary: Delete a media file from a draft project

post.summary: Accept or reject a submitted project (organizer only)
Start voting phase for event (organizer only)

get.description: Admin endpoint to list all UID card participant requests with optional status filter

post.description: Start the institutional-email verification flow: send a 6-digit OTP to the provided university email
post.summary: Submit institutional email and receive OTP (Client)

post.description: Complete institutional-email verification; on success the participant role is granted

get.description: Get all university ID card participant requests submitted by the current user

post.description:
Submit university ID details and document URL for admin review; limited to 2 pending requests.
Call POST /uid/upload-url first to upload the document and obtain the public_url.
Generate a 15-minute presigned PUT URL for direct upload to MinIO object storage
post.summary: Get presigned URL to upload UID card document (Client)

patch.description: Approve or reject a university ID card participant request

get.description: Admin endpoint to retrieve all participant requests submitted by a specific user
Admin endpoint to list all supervisor role applications with optional status filter

post.description: Submit credentials for admin review to gain the supervisor role
Start the supervisor-email verification flow: send a 6-digit OTP to the provided supervisor domain email
post.summary: Submit supervisor email and receive OTP (Client)

post.description: Complete supervisor-email verification; on success the supervisor role is granted

get.description: Get all supervisor role applications submitted by the current user

post.description: Generate a 15-minute presigned PUT URL for direct upload to MinIO object storage
post.summary: Get presigned URL to upload supervisor credential document (Client)

patch.description: Approve or reject a supervisor role application

get.description: Admin endpoint to retrieve all supervisor requests submitted by a specific user

get.summary: List notifications for the current user

post.description: When user_id is omitted the notification is broadcast to all users.

post.summary: Register a device token for push notifications

get.description: Retrieve a list of all system permissions

post.summary: Add a comment (with optional rating) to a project

delete.summary: Delete own comment from a project

get.summary: Get rating summary for a project

put.summary: Submit or update a project rating

get.summary: Get the current user's rating for a project

get.description: Retrieve a list of all system roles

post.description: Create a new system role with permissions

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific role

patch.description: Partially update role information and/or permissions (only provided fields)

post.description: Assign one or more permissions to a role

delete.description: Remove one or more permissions from a role

get.summary: Look up a project by QR barcode token
List pending invitations for the current user

200.description: Returned on accept; null on decline

post.summary: Invite a user to the team (leader only)

delete.summary: Remove a member from the team (leader only)

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of users

post.description: Create a new user account with optional network identifiers

get.description: Get the authenticated user's profile with roles

put.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information

post.description: Upload or replace the authenticated user's profile picture (max 5 MB, image/jpeg or image/png)

delete.description: Remove the authenticated user's profile picture

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific user

patch.description: Partially update user status or active state

delete.description: Permanently delete a user account and all related data

get.description: List permissions directly assigned to a user

post.description: Assign one or more permissions directly to a user

delete.description: Remove one or more direct permissions from a user

post.description: Assign one or more roles to a user

delete.description: Remove one or more roles from a user

email.description: Optional: required if PhoneNumber is not provided

password.description: Optional: required if Email is provided

phone_number.description: Optional: required if Email is not provided

role_ids.description: Optional: assign specific roles; defaults to visitor if empty

link.description: tg:// deep link to open in Flutter
